response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in geospatial data processing and distributed systems, which directly aligns with the core needs of this role. His work on GIS platforms, coupled with proven expertise in building high-performance, scalable systems and a dedication to software craftsmanship, makes him a compelling candidate. While his recent C++ experience is not extensive, his foundational C/C++ skills and demonstrated ability to adapt to new technologies suggest he has the potential to quickly ramp up in the required primary language.
strengths: Extensive experience in geospatial data processing and building GIS platforms (GISCollective, Green Map).
Proven track record in designing and operating high-performance, distributed systems at scale (Dunnhumby, Kubernetes).
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, CI/CD, and performance optimization.
concerns: Recent primary language experience is in TypeScript/Node.js and Dlang, with C++ experience being older.
No explicit mention of Rust, which is an acceptable alternative to C++.
Specific 'routing' domain experience is not explicitly detailed, though geospatial data processing is highly relevant.
